def to_base36(num)
  return '0' if num == 0
  digits = []
  while num > 0
    remainder = num % 36
    if remainder < 10
      digits.unshift(remainder.to_s)
    else
      char = (remainder - 10 + 65).chr
      digits.unshift(char)
    end
    num = num / 36
  end
  digits.join
end

def solve(n)
  n2 = n * n
  n3 = n * n * n
  hex_part = n2.to_s(16).upcase
  base36_part = to_base36(n3)
  hex_part + base36_part
end

def to_base36(num)
  return '0' if num == 0
  digits = []
  while num > 0
    remainder = num % 36
    if remainder < 10
      digits.unshift(remainder.to_s)
    else
      char = (remainder - 10 + 65).chr
      digits.unshift(char)
    end
    num = num / 36
  end
  digits.join
end

def solve(n)
  n2 = n * n
  n3 = n * n * n
  hex_part = n2.to_s(16).upcase
  base36_part = to_base36(n3)
  hex_part + base36_part
end
